nasb.text: To each of them he gave changes of garments, but to Benjamin he gave three hundred pieces of silver and five changes of garments.

esv.text: To each and all of them he gave a change of clothes, but to Benjamin he gave three hundred shekels of silver and five changes of clothes.

cnv.text: 又給了他們各人一套新衣服，但是給便雅憫三千四百二十克銀子和五套衣服。

ccb.text: 又给他们每人一套新衣服，但给了便雅悯五套新衣服和三百块银子。

csbs.text: 又给了每个哥哥一人一套更换的衣服，却给了本雅明三百块银子和五套更换的衣服；
